message:
chore(beads): close 2noh9.3.4 — virtualized results list complete

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -481,7 +481,7 @@
 {"id":"coding_agent_session_search-2noh9.3.17","title":"Task: Clipboard integration via OSC52 on ftui (copy paths, content, code blocks; works over SSH)","description":"## Why
The current TUI has basic clipboard via crossterm Paste events, but lacks reliable cross-terminal clipboard write support. OSC52 is the escape sequence that allows terminal apps to read/write the system clipboard without external dependencies — critical for multi-machine search (works over SSH).

## What
Leverage ftui-extras/clipboard for OSC52 clipboard integration:
1. **Copy selected result path+line** to clipboard (y or Ctrl+Y)
2. **Copy detail pane content** to clipboard (Ctrl+C in detail view without selection)
3. **Copy code block** from detail view (keybinding on specific code block)
4. **Copy search query** to clipboard
5. **Paste from clipboard** into search bar (Ctrl+V — unified API replacing raw crossterm Paste)

## Implementation
- ftui-extras clipboard module handles terminal capability detection (OSC52 support probe)
- Graceful fallback: if OSC52 not supported, try xclip/xsel/pbcopy
- Visual feedback: brief toast notification on successful copy ("Copied path to clipboard")
- Multi-select copy: Ctrl+Y copies all selected item paths separated by newlines

## Tests
- Unit: OSC52 escape sequence generation is correct
- Unit: Fallback chain works (OSC52 → xclip → noop with warning)
- Integration: Copy→paste roundtrip with ProgramSimulator
- E2E: Copy result path, verify clipboard content

## Acceptance Criteria
- Works over SSH sessions (OSC52 passthrough)
- Falls back gracefully on terminals without OSC52
- Toast confirms copy operation
- All existing y/Ctrl+Y behavior preserved

## Depends On
- 2noh9.2.3 (Program skeleton must be running)","status":"open","priority":2,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-02-06T07:58:34.903656751Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-02-06T08:00:33.479806754Z","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"labels":["ftui","tui","ux"],"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2noh9.3.17","depends_on_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2noh9.2.3","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-06T08:00:33.479689506Z","created_by":"ubuntu"},{"issue_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2noh9.3.17","depends_on_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2noh9.3","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-02-06T07:58:34.903656751Z","created_by":"ubuntu"}]}
 {"id":"coding_agent_session_search-2noh9.3.2","title":"Task: Search bar UX on ftui (text input, history, suggestions, debounce, match modes)","description":"## Goal
Recreate and improve the search bar experience:
- search-as-you-type with debounce (still sub-60ms perceived latency)
- Up/Down history navigation + de-dup
- Ctrl key edits (clear, delete token)
- Enter forces immediate search
- Match modes (standard/prefix) and wildcard fallback indicator
- Search modes (lexical/semantic/hybrid) toggle

## Implementation Notes
- Use `ftui-widgets::input` or `textarea` for editable text.
- State transitions should be reducer-style and unit-testable.
- Search execution should be cancelable/coalesced (avoid piling requests during typing).

## Tests
- Unit tests for query editing + history behavior.
- Deterministic simulation tests using `ftui_runtime::ProgramSimulator` for:
  - typing "auth" and seeing results update after debounce
  - Up/Down history nav

## Acceptance Criteria
- Behavior matches parity matrix for all documented keybindings.
- No input lag or dropped keystrokes under heavy rendering.","status":"closed","priority":0,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-02-06T07:28:10.964810150Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-02-07T00:41:06.586165597Z","closed_at":"2026-02-07T00:41:06.586143136Z","close_reason":"done","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"labels":["ftui","search","tui"],"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2noh9.3.2","depends_on_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2noh9.1.5","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-06T07:43:41.039710098Z","created_by":"ubuntu"},{"issue_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2noh9.3.2","depends_on_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2noh9.2.2","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-06T07:43:41.442165218Z","created_by":"ubuntu"},{"issue_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2noh9.3.2","depends_on_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2noh9.2.3","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-06T07:43:40.617283649Z","created_by":"ubuntu"},{"issue_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2noh9.3.2","depends_on_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2noh9.3","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-02-06T07:28:10.964810150Z","created_by":"ubuntu"}]}
 {"id":"coding_agent_session_search-2noh9.3.3","title":"Task: Filters UI on ftui (agent/workspace/time/source + pills + breadcrumbs + pickers)","description":"## Goal
Port the full filter system:
- Agent filter picker
- Workspace filter picker
- Time filters (since/until, presets like today/week/30d)
- Source filter (local/remote/all and per-source selection)
- Clear filters and reset-state actions
- Pills UI with edit/remove + mouse interaction
- Breadcrumb bar showing current scope/modes (agent/workspace/date/ranking)

## Implementation Notes
- Prefer `ftui-widgets` list/table widgets for pickers.
- Time parsing must reuse existing `src/ui/time_parser.rs` logic (or an extracted shared parser), not re-invent.

## Tests
- Unit tests for filter state transitions and time preset cycling.
- Snapshot tests for pills rendering with many filters.
- E2E (simulated) test: apply agent + workspace + since filters and verify query request includes them.

## Acceptance Criteria
- Filters behave identically to current UI (per parity matrix).
- Pills remain usable at 80 columns; overflow strategy documented.","status":"open","priority":0,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-02-06T07:28:24.546240365Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-02-06T07:43:42.225843839Z","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"labels":["filters","ftui","tui"],"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2noh9.3.3","depends_on_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2noh9.1.5","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-06T07:43:42.225747238Z","created_by":"ubuntu"},{"issue_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2noh9.3.3","depends_on_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2noh9.3","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-02-06T07:28:24.546240365Z","created_by":"ubuntu"},{"issue_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2noh9.3.3","depends_on_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2noh9.3.2","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-06T07:43:41.823264327Z","created_by":"ubuntu"}]}
-{"id":"coding_agent_session_search-2noh9.3.4","title":"Task: Results list on ftui (virtualized, multi-line items, stripes, role gutter, highlight, ranking)","description":"## Why
The current pane rendering manually iterates over hits with 2-line items, alternating stripe colors, rebuilding all widgets on every frame. ftui's VirtualizedList provides O(1) rendering for arbitrarily large result sets.

## What
Replace manual pane rendering with ftui_widgets::VirtualizedList:
- Fenwick-tree-based height predictor and viewport windowing
- Only renders visible items (critical for 100,000+ results)

Each result item renders as a custom widget:
1. **Agent icon/color badge** (using agent accent from theme — all 14 agents have distinct colors)
2. **Source path** (truncated with ellipsis)
3. **Line number** 
4. **Timestamp** (relative: '2h ago', 'yesterday', etc.)
5. **Preview snippet** (up to 3 lines with match highlighting)
6. **Multi-open queue indicator** (checkmark when queued via Ctrl+Enter)
7. **Source provenance badge** (e.g., [laptop] for remote sessions)

### Ranking Modes
Display adapts to current ranking mode (F12 cycles):
- RecentHeavy/DateNewest/DateOldest: show timestamp prominently
- Relevance/MatchQuality: show score prominently
- Balanced: balanced display

### Alternating Stripes
Even/odd items get subtle background tint for scanability, respecting current theme.

## Implementation
- Register hit regions per item for click selection
- Support keyboard navigation (j/k/Up/Down) through VirtualizedListState
- Viewport windowing means smooth scrolling even with 100K+ items
- Cache item heights for mixed-height items (compact vs cozy vs spacious density)

## Tests
- Unit: VirtualizedList with 100K items renders in <1ms
- Unit: Selection state preserved across re-renders
- Unit: Scroll position maintained when items change
- Snapshot: Result item renders correctly for each agent type (14 agents)
- Snapshot: Alternating stripes visible in both dark and light themes
- E2E: Search → scroll to item 50 → verify visible items are correct

## Acceptance Criteria
- Results list handles 100K+ items without lag
- All 14 agent colors render distinctly
- Match highlighting visible on search terms
- Multi-select checkmarks and queue indicators work
- Alternating stripes respect theme
- Scroll position stable during search-as-you-type

## Depends On
- 2noh9.3.1 (layout foundation)
- 2noh9.3.15 (theme for agent colors and stripes)
- 2noh9.3.2 (search bar triggers results updates)","status":"open","priority":0,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-02-06T07:28:41.415419358Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-02-06T08:03:20.081135132Z","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"labels":["ftui","performance","results","tui"],"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2noh9.3.4","depends_on_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2noh9.3","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-02-06T07:28:41.415419358Z","created_by":"ubuntu"},{"issue_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2noh9.3.4","depends_on_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2noh9.3.1","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-06T07:43:42.622769901Z","created_by":"ubuntu"},{"issue_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2noh9.3.4","depends_on_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2noh9.3.15","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-06T07:43:43.453549724Z","created_by":"ubuntu"},{"issue_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2noh9.3.4","depends_on_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2noh9.3.2","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-06T07:43:43.038404639Z","created_by":"ubuntu"}]}

The current pane rendering manually iterates over hits with 2-line items, alternating stripe colors, rebuilding all widgets on every frame. ftui's VirtualizedList provides O(1) rendering for arbitrarily large result sets.

## What
Replace manual pane rendering with ftui_widgets::VirtualizedList:

Each result item renders as a custom widget:
1. **Agent icon/color badge** (using agent accent from theme — all 14 agents have distinct colors)
2. **Source path** (truncated with ellipsis)
3. **Line number** 
4. **Timestamp** (relative: '2h ago', 'yesterday', etc.)
5. **Preview snippet** (up to 3 lines with match highlighting)
6. **Multi-open queue indicator** (checkmark when queued via Ctrl+Enter)
7. **Source provenance badge** (e.g., [laptop] for remote sessions)

### Ranking Modes
Display adapts to current ranking mode (F12 cycles):
- RecentHeavy/DateNewest/DateOldest: show timestamp prominently
- Relevance/MatchQuality: show score prominently
- Balanced: balanced display

### Alternating Stripes
Even/odd items get subtle background tint for scanability, respecting current theme.

## Implementation
- Register hit regions per item for click selection
- Support keyboard navigation (j/k/Up/Down) through VirtualizedListState
- Viewport windowing means smooth scrolling even with 100K+ items
- Cache item heights for mixed-height items (compact vs cozy vs spacious density)

## Tests

- Unit: Selection state preserved across re-renders
- Unit: Scroll position maintained when items change
- Snapshot: Result item renders correctly for each agent type (14 agents)
- Snapshot: Alternating stripes visible in both dark and light themes
- E2E: Search → scroll to item 50 → verify visible items are correct

## Acceptance Criteria

 {"id":"coding_agent_session_search-2noh9.3.5","title":"Task: Detail/preview view on ftui (Messages/Snippets/Raw tabs, wrap, find-in-detail, syntax highlight)","description":"## Why
The current detail pane (src/ui/detail_pane.rs) renders conversation messages as ratatui Lines with manual formatting. ftui-extras provides markdown rendering and tree-sitter syntax highlighting out of the box.

## What
Replace detail pane with rich rendering using ftui-extras markdown + syntax modules:

### Three Tabs (switchable with [ and ])
1. **Messages tab**: Full conversation with markdown rendering
2. **Snippets tab**: Keyword-extracted summaries for quick scanning
3. **Raw tab**: Unformatted JSON/text (enhanced by JSON viewer 2noh9.4.16)

### Message Rendering
- ftui-extras/markdown: full Markdown-to-styled-text (headers, bold/italic, code blocks, lists, blockquotes, links, tables)
- ftui-extras/syntax: tree-sitter-based syntax highlighting for code blocks (language auto-detection)
- Role-colored blocks: user (blue tint), assistant (green), system (gray), tool (orange)
- Tool call sections as collapsible ftui_widgets::tree::Tree nodes (expand to see arguments)
- Conversation header: session metadata, agent, timestamp

### Find-in-Detail
- Press / to start find-in-detail search
- Use SearchConfig with match highlighting
- n/N to navigate matches forward/backward
- Highlight matches in all tabs

### Scrolling
- Scrollbar widget (ftui_widgets::scrollbar::Scrollbar) for navigation
- PgUp/PgDn for page scrolling
- g/G for top/bottom (in full-screen mode)
- Ctrl+Space for momentary 'peek' to XL context

### Context Window Sizing (F7 cycles)
- Small (~200 chars): Quick scanning
- Medium (~400 chars): Default balanced
- Large (~800 chars): Longer passages  
- XLarge (~1600 chars): Full context, code review

### Word Wrap
Content wraps intelligently at terminal width, preserving code block formatting.

## Tests
- Unit: Markdown rendering of headers, code, lists produces expected styled text
- Unit: Syntax highlighting identifies correct language for common extensions
- Unit: Find-in-detail highlights correct matches and navigates properly
- Snapshot: Detail pane with mock conversation matches golden reference
- Snapshot: Each role (user/assistant/system/tool) renders with correct theme colors
- E2E: Select result → detail pane shows content → find → navigate matches

## Acceptance Criteria
- All markdown elements render correctly (headers, code, lists, tables, links)
- Syntax highlighting for at least 10 common languages (Rust, Python, JS, TS, Go, Java, C, C++, Ruby, SQL)
- Tool calls are collapsible
- Find-in-detail works across all tabs
- Context window sizing works (F7 cycles)
- No rendering glitches at 80x24 minimum terminal size

## Depends On
- 2noh9.3.1 (layout foundation)
- 2noh9.3.15 (theme for role colors)","status":"open","priority":0,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-02-06T07:28:58.490476347Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-02-06T08:03:44.964968597Z","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"labels":["detail","ftui","tui"],"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2noh9.3.5","depends_on_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2noh9.3","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-02-06T07:28:58.490476347Z","created_by":"ubuntu"},{"issue_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2noh9.3.5","depends_on_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2noh9.3.15","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-06T07:43:44.246747589Z","created_by":"ubuntu"},{"issue_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2noh9.3.5","depends_on_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2noh9.3.4","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-06T07:43:43.846536814Z","created_by":"ubuntu"}]}
 {"id":"coding_agent_session_search-2noh9.3.6","title":"Task: Command palette on ftui (action registry, fuzzy search, keybinding hints)","description":"## Goal
Port the command palette (currently `src/ui/components/palette.rs`) and upgrade it using ftui widgets.

## Requirements
- `Ctrl+P` opens palette.
- Palette lists actions with labels + hints.
- Typing filters the list.
- Enter executes selected action.
- Works in degraded terminals (no function keys).

## Implementation Notes
- Prefer `ftui-widgets::command_palette` + `help_registry` integration.
- Action system should be shared with help overlay so shortcuts and palette stay in sync.

## Tests
- Unit tests for filtering and action selection.
- Snapshot test for palette rendering.

## Acceptance Criteria
- All existing palette actions are available (theme, density, filters, saved views, bulk actions, reload index, update banner).","status":"closed","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-02-06T07:29:13.028348579Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-02-06T19:20:47.697200733Z","closed_at":"2026-02-06T19:20:47.697165147Z","close_reason":"done","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"labels":["ftui","tui","ux"],"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2noh9.3.6","depends_on_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2noh9.1.5","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-06T07:43:44.595940921Z","created_by":"ubuntu"},{"issue_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2noh9.3.6","depends_on_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2noh9.2.3","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-06T07:43:44.929004345Z","created_by":"ubuntu"},{"issue_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2noh9.3.6","depends_on_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2noh9.3","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-02-06T07:29:13.028348579Z","created_by":"ubuntu"}]}
 {"id":"coding_agent_session_search-2noh9.3.7","title":"Task: Help overlay + contextual help strip on ftui (discoverability, pinned state)","description":"## Goal
Port:
- quick help overlay (`F1` / `?`)
- contextual help strip/footer hints (pin/unpin state)

## Implementation Notes
- Prefer `ftui-widgets::help` + `help_registry`.
- Keybinding hints should be derived from the same action registry used by the command palette.

## Tests
- Snapshot tests for help overlay in narrow and wide terminals.
- Unit tests that ensure shortcut strings in `src/ui/shortcuts.rs` appear in help output.

## Acceptance Criteria
- Help is accurate and stays in sync with real keymap.
- Pinned state persists across runs.","status":"in_progress","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-02-06T07:29:29.077528676Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-02-06T21:47:33.345784783Z","close_reason":"Implemented help overlay + contextual help strip on ftui. Added render_help_overlay_ftui (centered scrollable modal with 5 sections), render_help_strip_ftui (single-line footer with contextual shortcuts), contextual_shortcuts method (10 context-aware states), and build_help_lines helper. Shortcuts from shortcuts.rs constants. 14 unit tests + 5 snapshot tests.","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"labels":["docs","ftui","tui","ux"],"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2noh9.3.7","depends_on_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2noh9.1.5","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-06T07:43:45.604374533Z","created_by":"ubuntu"},{"issue_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2noh9.3.7","depends_on_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2noh9.3","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-02-06T07:29:29.077528676Z","created_by":"ubuntu"},{"issue_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2noh9.3.7","depends_on_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2noh9.3.6","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-06T07:43:45.271637067Z","created_by":"ubuntu"}]}
